summary: P1/P2 UX/Logic fixes testing complete. All 12 API tests pass + 18 regression tests pass. P1 (waived status): Backend correctly returns financial_impact.type='neutral' for waived disputes. Frontend displays 'Classé sans suite' with slate/gray styling. P2 (admin categories): Backend returns total_closed instead of separate resolved/agreed. Frontend shows 3 KPI cards with correct labels.

P2 VERIFIED: admin_arbitration_service.py FILTER_QUERIES has 'closed' replacing 'resolved'+'agreed'
P2 VERIFIED: get_arbitration_stats returns total_closed (combined count)
P2 VERIFIED: AdminArbitrationList.js FILTERS has 3 entries: escalated, awaiting, closed
P2 VERIFIED: STATUS_BADGES shows 'Clos — Accord mutuel' for agreed_* and 'Clos — Arbitrage' for resolved

Admin arbitration page shows 3 KPI cards (A arbitrer, En attente des parties, Clos) instead of 4. All regression tests pass.
